zh.lifeSummary: 當Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan於1430年出生在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾利安德希利奧格格時，他的父親Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain-77歲，母親Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn-70歲。他於1465年與Margred ferch Ieuan在英國威爾斯卡迪甘史爾利安德希利奧格格結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan于1430年出生在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾利安德希利奧格格时，他的父亲Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain-77岁，母亲Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn-70岁。他于1465年与Margred ferch Ieuan在英国威尔斯卡迪甘史爾利安德希利奧格格结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Geza, Jeno, Arpad, Attila, Csaba.

Hungarian: variant of   Papp  , meaning ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’. This surname is also found in Romania, Slovakia, Croatia, and Serbia, and also among Rusyns (in Serbia and Croatia). See also   Pop   2 and   Popa  .

variants.name: Papp
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Laszlo, Zoltan, Geza, Istvan, Gabor, Miklos, Tibor, Arpad, Denes, Imre, Attila.
German (Bavaria, Tyrol): from Middle High German pap ‘baby food’, Dutch pap ‘porridge, pap’, hence perhaps a nickname denoting someone who had lost his teeth or subsisted on a meager diet.

Hungarian: from pap ‘priest (of the Catholic or Orthodox Church)’, probably an occupational name for someone in the service of a priest or a nickname for a pious person. This surname is also found in Romania and Slovakia, and also among Rusyns. Compare Pap and Pop .

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

historicEvents.description: Charles I of Spain became Emperor Charles V of the Holy Roman Empire.

en.lifeSummary: When Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan was born in 1430, in Llandyssiliogogo, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain, was -77 and his mother, Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn, was -70. He married Margred ferch Ieuan in 1465, in Llandyssiliogogo, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters.

Il a épousé Margred ferch Ieuan en 1465, à Llandyssiliogogo, Cardiganshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles.

Er hat 1465 in Llandyssiliogogo, Cardiganshire, Wales, United Kingdom Margred ferch Ieuan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuanが1430年にイギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアランディシリオゴゴで生まれた時，父Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owainは-77歳，母Gwenllian Ferch Llywelynは-70歳であった。1465年にイギリスウェールズカーディガンシュアイアランディシリオゴゴでMargred ferch Ieuanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan(이)가 1430년 영국 웨일스 카디건실르 랜디실리오고고에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain(은)는 -77세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn(은)는 -70세였다. 그는 1465년 영국 웨일스 카디건실르 랜디실리오고고에서 Margred ferch Ieuan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan родился в 1430 г. в местности лландиссилиогого, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain было -77 год, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn, -70. Он женился на женщине по имени Margred ferch Ieuan в 1465 г. в местности лландиссилиогого, кардиганьшир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dafydd "Llwyd" ap Ieuan nació en 1430, en Llandyssiliogogo, Cardiganshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Ieuan "Llwyd" Ap Owain, tenía -77 años y su mamá, Gwenllian Ferch Llywelyn, tenía -70 años. Se casó con Margred ferch Ieuan en 1465, en Llandyssiliogogo, Cardiganshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas.
